_comment: SYNTHETIC baseline severity priors for categories that have no public dataset yet (Roads, Water, Sanitation, Electricity, Vocational). These are plausible rural-Maharashtra estimates, NOT measurements. The API reports them with data_confidence='synthetic' so consumers and judges can distinguish them from real government data. Replace with real datasets (PMGSY road data, Jal Jeevan Mission coverage, SBM sanitation data, etc.) as they are integrated.
